title: SheeChung 2 Pack Qtip Dispenser Apothecary Jars Bathroom with Labels - Qtip Holder Storage Canister Clear Plastic Acrylic Jar for Cotton Ball,Cotton Swab,Q-tips,Cotton Rounds (Small)
description:
About this item
Acrylic
✅BEATIFUL AND FUNCTIONAL: The clear acrylic apothecary jars combine BEAUTY with organization. A rounded base provides plenty of room for storing cotton swabs, qtips, cotton balls, cotton rounds and is easily wiped clean with soap and water
✅SIMPLE AND EASY TO USE: Each apothecary jar has a removable acrylic lid and a wide mouth to make accessing bathroom necessities and accessories simple, easy to set the Q-Tips perfectly in the dispenser and easy to get them out
✅MAKING HOME A BETTER SPACE:The qtip holder is also clear plastic jar, modern design, functional yet decorative,not just for the bathroom, also PERFECT in the kitchen
✅DURABLE:The small apothecary jars is durable,looks like glass but WILL NOT SHATTER
✅SATISFACTION GUARANTEED:If you have any questions, please contact us in time, we will solve it properly for you within 24 hours.Enjoy the shopping, enjoy the better lifestyle with our qtip holder.
reviews_5s:
I ordered this set of two more covered jars after having already ordered the sets of 3 jars and a tray. These are clear acrylic jars and tops that are convenient, easy to clean, and look good for neatly storing all types of small items. The size is just right for my uses, but note the measurements before ordering. Very pleased with the quality and the price; so useful and versatile.

I'm using them to store my cotton swabs, bandaids, daily vials of moisturizing eye drops, extra contact lens cases, little perfume vials, spare Sonicare toothbrush heads, floss picks, etc. Also good for things like makeup remover pads, hair bands, cotton balls, etc. etc. These look much better and take up far less space than the packaging the products come in, and they fit on my medicine cabinet shelves and in drawers.

They include sets of adhesive preprinted and blank labels but I don't use those. It's easy to see what's inside them.This is a great space saver for small bathrooms. It's great for storing tips, cotton balls or squares, or any thing that is around that size. It's made of plastic and very durable. The two parts sit well on top of one another making for a great fit.These small acrylic containers are fantastic! I love how they keep everything fully visible while still allowing for a secure lid. The lids fit perfectly snug, making them both practical and stylish. I’d definitely buy them again!Love the dark amber color! Work really well have all the pre printed labels i needed! Grat value!I like that it came with labels. You can use or not use them. The lid is a little tight but all in all a good product put to good use.So glad I bought these. Cutest thing ever sitting in our bathroom. One is holding q tips and one is holding cotton balls. Saves me from having to get in the medicine closet every morning.I have these 4 containers on my counter for organizing my tooth picks or nail clippers qtips. There’s a lot things you can use them for but there so light weighted they don’t take much space up on my counter and that’s what I love because I HATE crowded counters.These were perfect for organizing toothpicks in the kitchen as well as some bathroom items. It gets my stuff out of drawers.Great for bathroom usr not cheaply made good qualityI bought these for Christmas gifts I'm going to fill them with cotton swabs and qtips and lil things for my granddaughters
reviews_1s:
I got two stackable ones. The lid keeps falling off them, so every time I
lift one off the top of the other the lid flies off. And, they are much
smaller than I expected. I thought they would be wider, to hold a
box of Q Tips in.. yes, they are just tall enough for Q Tips, but small
around.Way too small. I guess for $6.99 you get what you pay for 🙄Picture is deceptive too small to be practicalProduct description claimed each jar was 12oz capacity. In reality each jar barely holds 8oz. Will be returning.I don't think anyone would purchase these containers if you saw them in a store. They are so poorly made that the top has a very visible seam with a sharp edge right near the knob. Good luck grabbing the knob and not getting cut. I want to overlook the size but these are really really really small. I guess it's true...you get what you pay for and these were the least expensive option. I'll have to re-order and read the reviews a little more carefully.Not one of my better Amazon purchases. The lids have a seam which looks really cheap and on top of that, there was an area on that seam where it looked liked some extra plastic oozed out and when they trimmed it off, looked like a flaw. So ... I guess sometimes you get what you pay for. These items were returned; I do not recommend.Cute and cheap but worthless. Lid must be jammed down to close and then it’s stuck and you need strong hands to wrangle it back open. Not suitable for a product that needs to be accessed every day for the bathroom. Will get proper glass or ceramic containers with well fitting lids. This was junk.Had them for only a few weeks and they are spontaneously cracking. Don’t waste your money.These are cheaply made and all the lids have cracks on them.Product was ok, but I needed 4 and thought I was paying for 4 --NOT 2
